parents.subject: LU-6872 lov: avoid infinite loop in lsm_alloc_plain()

commit.subject: LU-6895 ldiskfs: debug patch for kernel-3.x dir corruption
commit.message:
LU-6895 ldiskfs: debug patch for kernel-3.x dir corruption

It is suspected that the dir block overwrote xattr entry/block
on kernel 3.x. The patch is used for catching more information.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=sles11sp3 ossdistro=sles11sp3 mdsdistro=sles11sp3 mdtcount=1 testlist=sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck
Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 mdtcount=1 testlist=sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck
Signed-off-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ic62a08f4c13eddc2f02a2c1fc96ed03366b14ab3
